subcodes.first_line: How many a beloved one have We found to be but a bubble, and how many a friend hath turned into a heretic by following his idle fancies, heedless of his Lord! [3.5s]... ...O concourse of the Son! Verily the kingdom of God has been adorned in My name and His dominion with My sovereignty and Jesus Christ [the Spirit] laments that which has befallen Me
subcodes.first_line_orig: کم من حبیب وجدناه حباباً و کم من صدیق صار زندیقاً بما اتبع هواه غافلاً عن مولاه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @proclamation to divines; to religious leaders, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @proclamation to people of the Bayan
